title: alcicornium stemaria
intro: Alcicornium stemaria, a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae, is also known as the "Butterfly Pea" or "Asian Pigeonwings." This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its flowers, which contain anthocyanins that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Alcicornium stemaria include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antiseptic, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Alcicornium stemaria include teas, infusions, and capsules, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
